x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Non-conversational catalog items cannot use Now Assist VA for guided fulfillment or AI-assisted intake. Converting items to conversational format is a high-value quick win for Now Assist enablement.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Convert high-volume catalog items to conversational format by removing multi-row variable sets, client scripts, and other blockers. Navigate to Service Catalog > Catalog Administrator > Conversational Catalog Overview to identify and address non-conversational items. Target: 80%+ of catalog items with conversational_render_type=conversation.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c26
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Non-conversational catalog items cannot use Now Assist VA for guided fulfillment or AI-assisted intake. Converting items to conversational format is a high-value quick win for Now Assist enablement.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Non-Conversational Catalog Items</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // catalog_item_analytics tracks VA/Now Assist compatibility per catalog item
    // conversational_render_type values:
    //   'conversation' = inline chat (conversational)
    //   'window'       = portal link (non-conversational)
    //   'popup-seismic'= popup (non-conversational)
    var testGr = new GlideRecord('catalog_item_analytics');
    testGr.setLimit(1);
    testGr.query();
    if (!testGr.isValid()) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'catalog_item_analytics table not found',
            finding: 'Conversational catalog analytics table not available on this instance. Now Assist Conversational Catalog may not be installed.'
        };
    }

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('catalog_item_analytics');
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No catalog items found in catalog_item_analytics',
            finding: 'No catalog items tracked in conversational analytics. Enable Now Assist Conversational Catalog and allow catalog usage data to populate.'
        };
    }

    var gaConv = new GlideAggregate('catalog_item_analytics');
    gaConv.addQuery('conversational_render_type', 'conversation');
    gaConv.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaConv.query();
    var conversational = gaConv.next() ? parseInt(gaConv.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var nonConv = total - conversational;
    var pct = Math.round((conversational / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% conversational (' + conversational + ' of ' + total + ' catalog items render inline in chat)';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of catalog items render conversationally in chat. Now Assist guided fulfillment has broad catalog coverage for AI-assisted employee intake.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of catalog items are conversational (target: 80%+). ' + nonConv + ' items redirect to portal instead of inline chat — Now Assist guided fulfillment scope is limited.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of catalog items are conversational. Majority of catalog items cannot use Now Assist inline guided fulfillment — convert high-volume items to conversational format.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005961</number>
<order>220</order>
<remediation_guidance>Convert high-volume catalog items to conversational format by removing multi-row variable sets, client scripts, and other blockers. Navigate to Service Catalog > Catalog Administrator > Conversational Catalog Overview to identify and address non-conversational items. Target: 80%+ of catalog items with conversational_render_type=conversation.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c26</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
